items: Bryan Woo blanked Baltimore for 7.0 innings, striking out 9 in Seattle's 3-0 win.
Juan Soto homered 2 times as The Mets beat Philadelphia, 6-4.
Sean Burke held down The Yankees for 7.1 innings, striking out 8 in Chicago White Sox's 5-1 win.
Seattle pitching combined to shut out Baltimore, 3-0.
Atlanta pitching combined to shut out San Francisco, 0-0.
The Athletics pitching combined to shut out The Angels, 5-0.
